original_writing: My favorite season is [S]autum. I like it [G]because the weather are cool and the leaves [V]change to beautiful colors. Every year I [O]with my family go to the park.
corrected_writing: My favorite season is autumn. I like it because the weather is cool and the leaves change to beautiful colors. Every year I go to the park with my family.

error_explanations.explanation_en: Spelling error. The correct spelling is 'autumn'.
Grammar error. 'The weather' is singular, so the verb should be 'is'.
error_explanations.explanation: 문법 오류입니다. 'the weather'는 단수이므로 동사는 'is'여야 합니다.

error_explanations.explanation_en: Vocabulary suggestion. 'Turn' is more natural in this context.
error_explanations.explanation: 어휘 제안입니다. 이 맥락에서는 'turn'이 더 자연스럽습니다.

error_explanations.explanation_en: Word order error. The correct order is 'go to the park with my family'.
error_explanations.explanation: 어순 오류입니다. 올바른 어순은 'go to the park with my family'입니다.

overall_comments: The student demonstrates a good understanding of paragraph structure and uses appropriate vocabulary. Focus on spelling accuracy and subject-verb agreement to further improve writing quality.
